label: Polestar 2 / Volvo XC40 Recharge / C40 / EX40 / EX30 (CMA & SPA2 platforms via BECM)

ecu.notes: BECM (Battery Energy Control Module) on extended 29-bit ISO-TP. Forum posts cite the BECM target address as 0x52 (response 0x1DD01635 also seen as a broadcast).

applicable_models: Volvo EX30 (note: EX30 is on Geely SEA platform - decode may differ)

fields.notes: BMS HV battery SOH; confirmed via Car Scanner community.

unavailable_fields.soc_pack_voltage_pack_current_per_cell_t: Per-byte map for these fields is bundled in commercial Car Scanner profile; not republished in any open-source repo. Field not documented for this vendor at byte-resolution.
